content: GitHub Actions workflow uses actions/checkout@v4 and actions/setup-go@v5. Earlier versions (v6) don't exist and cause all jobs to fail.
Build targets: make build (local), make build-linux-arm64 (test device), make build-all (all platforms). Binary output in build/ directory.
Successfully built fernwood for both AMD64 and ARM64 architectures using make build and make build-linux-arm64 targets. Binary sizes: 16.9MB (AMD64) and 15.8MB (ARM64).
